sample_quotes: i have ordered from instamart by mistake i have selected one wrong item for that they have taken a 100% cancelled fee amount of 236. hence i was a regular swiggy customer. they are giving false promises to customers that the amount will be credited to your account but after a few days they will say a cancellation fee,!
